query: 销售额最高的5个供应商
expected_sql: SELECT suppliers.name AS dimension_value, ROUND(SUM(order_items.subtotal), 2) AS metric_value FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN spus ON skus.spu_id = spus.spu_id JOIN suppliers ON spus.supplier_id = suppliers.supplier_id GROUP BY suppliers.supplier_id, suppliers.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 5

expected_result.dimension_value: 宁波华仓储物流有限公司
济南源供应链有限公司
重庆宏电子商务有限公司
南京源供应链有限公司

query: 不同品牌国家的销售额分布
expected_sql: SELECT brands.country AS dimension_value, ROUND(SUM(order_items.subtotal), 2) AS metric_value FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN spus ON skus.spu_id = spus.spu_id JOIN brands ON spus.brand_id = brands.brand_id GROUP BY brands.country ORDER BY metric_value DESC

query: 各仓库的可用库存总量
expected_sql: SELECT warehouses.name AS dimension_value, SUM(inventory.quantity) AS metric_value FROM inventory JOIN warehouses ON inventory.warehouse_id = warehouses.warehouse_id GROUP BY warehouses.warehouse_id, warehouses.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC

query: 各会员等级的平均客单价
expected_sql: SELECT membership_levels.name AS dimension_value, ROUND(AVG(orders.total_amount), 2) AS metric_value FROM orders JOIN users ON orders.user_id = users.user_id JOIN membership_levels ON users.level_id = membership_levels.level_id GROUP BY membership_levels.level_id, membership_levels.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC

SELECT logistics_companies.name AS dimension_value, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN shipments.status = 'signed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS metric_value FROM shipments JOIN logistics_companies ON shipments.company_id = logistics_companies.company_id GROUP BY logistics_companies.company_id, logistics_companies.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC

query: 从未下过单的用户有多少人
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM users WHERE user_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM orders)

SELECT l1.name AS dimension_value, ROUND(SUM(order_items.subtotal), 2) AS metric_value FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN spus ON skus.spu_id = spus.spu_id JOIN categories l3 ON spus.category_id = l3.category_id JOIN categories l2 ON l3.parent_id = l2.category_id JOIN categories l1 ON l2.parent_id = l1.category_id GROUP BY l1.category_id, l1.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM users WHERE substr(birth_date, 1, 4) >= '1990' AND substr(birth_date, 1, 4) <= '1999'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM skus WHERE sku_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT sku_id FROM product_reviews)

query: 平均每个订单包含多少件商品
expected_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(quantity) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 2) AS metric_value FROM order_items
SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS metric_value FROM orders

query: 各来源渠道的用户行为事件数分布
expected_sql: SELECT source AS dimension_value, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM user_events GROUP BY source ORDER BY metric_value DESC
